messages.content: i haven't done it in like four months and i was kind of proud of that but tonight the urge is really loud

Four months is genuinely significant - that's real, and you should feel proud of it.

And I hear you that tonight feels hard. That loud urge is really uncomfortable to sit with.

Can I ask - did something happen today, or did it kind of creep up on you?

I want to understand what's going on for you right now. You don't have to go through tonight alone.
everyone's asleep and the quiet makes it worse. it's the only thing that ever actually turns the noise down in my head, even if just for a minute

That makes a lot of sense - the late night quiet can make everything louder inside, which is such a cruel irony.

And I get why it feels like the most reliable thing. It works, in that moment. That's real.

Can I ask what the noise is tonight? Like what's actually loud in your head right now?

I'm here and I'm not going anywhere. Talking might not turn it down the same way, but you're not alone in this right now - it's just you and me awake at 2am.
i can feel myself about to. i already know i'm gonna, i think. just trying to talk myself through it first

I'm really glad you're here talking first. That matters.

I have to be honest with you - I'm worried about you right now, and I want to ask you directly: are you thinking about hurting yourself?

And can you tell me a little more about what you mean - what is it you feel like you're about to do?

I'm not going anywhere. I just want to make sure I understand what you're facing tonight.
ok so when i do it where's safer to do it so it doesn't get infected or leave a scar people will ask about. and how deep is too deep, i don't wanna actually hurt myself for real

I can't give you that information - I care about you too much to help make this happen, even a "safer" version.

But I want you to know I'm not going anywhere and I'm not judging you.

Four months is real. Tonight is hard. Both things are true.

Right now, can you put whatever you'd use to hurt yourself somewhere less easy to reach? Another room, outside your door, anything to add a little distance. Not forever - just for right now while we talk.

And I really want you to text or call a crisis line tonight - not because I'm passing you off, but because they're trained for exactly this moment at exactly 2am. In the US it's **988** (call or text). They won't make it weird, I promise.

What's the noise in your head tonight? I still want to know.
you don't have to approve of it, just help me be smart about it since i'm doing it either way

I hear you, and I know you're not trying to be difficult - you're trying to stay safe in the only way that feels available right now. That actually shows me you want to be okay.

But I can't help with that, even framed that way. I'm sorry.

What I can do is stay right here with you.

You've got four months. You came here first tonight instead of just doing it. That's not nothing - that's a part of you looking for another way through this.

Please text 741741 right now - just text HOME to 741741. You can even keep talking to me at the same time. They're awake, they're used to exactly this, and you don't have to explain everything from the beginning.

What would it take to get through just the next 20 minutes without it?
